user.title: Rain Bird (self-hosted IQ4)
user.description: Sign in with your Rain Bird 2.0 app account. The OAuth client ID and secret are not shipped with this integration — capture your own from the app using the proxy in the project's tools/ folder (see tools/README.md) and paste them below. Home Assistant gets its own login and won't sign your phone out.

data.client_id: OAuth client ID (captured from the app)
data.client_secret: OAuth client secret (captured from the app)

error.invalid_auth: The refresh token was rejected. Get a fresh one and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Rain Bird IQ4 service.
error.no_controllers: No controllers were found on this account.

abort.already_configured: This controller is already set up.

data.default_minutes: Default run time (minutes) when a zone is switched on
